name: Helius
description: The most powerful Solana RPC and API platform. Enhanced APIs for DAS, webhooks, and priority fees.

name: QuickNode
description: Multi-chain node provider with Solana support. Reliable RPC endpoints with add-on marketplace.

name: Triton (RPC Pool)
description: Dedicated Solana RPC infrastructure used by major protocols. High-performance and low-latency.

name: Shyft
description: Solana API platform with DAS, transaction parsing, and webhook support for indexing on-chain events.

name: The Graph (Solana)
description: Decentralized indexing protocol with Solana subgraph support for querying on-chain data via GraphQL.

name: Geyser Plugins
description: Solana validator plugin interface for streaming real-time account and transaction updates.

name: Yellowstone gRPC
description: High-performance gRPC Geyser plugin for streaming real-time Solana data. Used by Helius, Triton, and others.
